name: Krautsuppe (Cabbage Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart saucepan or pot, combine all ingredients except salt, pepper, and cheese.
2. Simmer partially covered for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
3. Discard the parsley bundle; season to taste.
4. Pour into hot soup plates and garnish with grated Parmesan cheese.
